acquisition method: Data-dependent MS/MS was performed with top of speed setting
alkylation reagent: cysteine alkylated with 25 mM methyl methanethiosulfonate
alkylation concentration: cysteine alkylated with 25 mM methyl methanethiosulfonate
cleavage agent: 5 µg Trypsin/Lys-C Mix (Promega, Madison, WI, USA)
fractionation method: Two fractions of EPs were separated from culture medium using differential centrifugation
instrument: Nano-LC–MS/MS analysis was carried out with the Obitrap Fusion Lumos Tribrid Mass Spectrometer
labeling: Protein identification and label-free quantification were carried out using the Proteome Discoverer software package
reduction reagent: Proteins were reduced with 2.5 mM dithiothreitol (DTT)
reduction concentration: Proteins were reduced with 2.5 mM dithiothreitol (DTT)
